title: Content Manager Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Content Manager Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' rx='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='20' y='120' rx='5' width='360' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='40' y='160' rx='5' width='320' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='220' y='20' rx='5' width='160' height='40' fill='#411C56'><text x='10' y='18' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='14'>Search</text></rect><rect x='220' y='70' rx='5' width='160' height='40' fill='#411C56'><text x='10' y='18' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='14'>Filter</text></rect><g transform='translate(250, 120)'><rect x='-80' y='-10' rx='5' width='150' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD'><text x='10' y='18' fill='#000000' font-size='14'>Category</text></rect><rect x='0' y='0' rx='5' width='150' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD'><text x='10' y='18' fill='#000000' font-size='14'>Author</text></rect></g><rect x='20' y='210' rx='5' width='360' height='40' fill='#411C56'><text x='10' y='18' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='14'>Content Items</text></rect><g transform='translate(40, 230)'><rect x='0' y='0' rx='5' width='360' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'><text x='10' y='10' fill='#000000' font-size='14'>ID</text></rect><rect x='0' y='30' rx='5' width='360' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'><text x='10' y='10' fill='#000000' font-size='14'>Title</text></rect></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must display content items in a table with ID and title columns
Must implement search and filter functionality

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Content Manager Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive search and filter functionality, table rendering, and content item selection.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
